seoTitle: Make a Carousel Slider in Canva
metaDescription: Learn how to design a carousel slider in Canva to showcase multiple images or products in a single engaging social post.
intro: Carousel sliders let viewers swipe through several images or slides, making them a popular format for showcasing products or storytelling on social media. This guide walks through creating one in Canva.

steps.heading: Overview of Canva features for carousels
steps.body: Choose a carousel or multi-page template in Canva sized correctly for your target platform.

steps.heading: Step-by-step creation process
steps.body: Design each slide individually, keeping a consistent visual thread so the carousel feels cohesive when swiped through.

steps.heading: Tips for effective design
steps.body: Use clear visuals and concise text on each slide to keep viewers engaged as they move through the carousel.

steps.heading: Exporting and sharing your slider
steps.body: Export each slide in the correct order and format for the platform where you plan to post the carousel.

faq.question: What platforms support carousel posts?
faq.answer: Many social media platforms support carousel or multi-image posts, though exact formatting requirements can vary by platform.

faq.question: How many slides should a carousel have?
faq.answer: This depends on your content and platform limits, but keeping it focused and not overly long tends to perform better.

faq.question: Can I reuse a carousel template for future posts?
faq.answer: Yes, saving your carousel design as a template makes it easy to update content for future posts without starting over.

faq.question: Is this feature good for product launches?
faq.answer: Yes, carousels are a popular way to highlight multiple product features or variations in a single post.
